title:
Full Stack Engineer
Full Stack Engineer
description:
About the job
About Our Client

Our client is a large, well‑established enterprise organisation operating within the financial services sector. They are currently undertaking a significant technology modernisation program focused on building scalable, secure, and high‑performance digital platforms.

Due to the confidential nature of this engagement, further details will be shared during the interview process.

About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Full‑Stack Developer to join a high‑performing delivery team working on enterprise‑scale applications. This role will involve hands‑on development across both Java back‑end services and modern React front‑end applications, contributing to the design, build, and enhancement of business‑critical systems.

You will work closely with business stakeholders, product owners, and globally distributed technical teams in an Agile environment, delivering high‑quality solutions within agreed timeframes.

The Successful Candidate

The ideal candidate will bring a strong technical background combined with excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills.

Key skills and experience include:

8+ years’ experience in software development
Strong hands‑on experience with Core Java (Java 8+), Spring Boot, Hibernate, and RESTful web services
Front‑end development experience using ReactJS, including Redux and Redux‑Saga
Experience developing or integrating Node.js APIs
Solid understanding of unit testing, including JUnit and JavaScript testing frameworks
Experience defining and consuming APIs using Swagger / OpenAPI
Previous experience in banking or financial services environments
Strong Agile delivery experience
Excellent communication skills and ability to work with business users and global teams

Nice to have:

Experience with Lodash, React selectors, and styled‑components
Exposure to cloud platforms and DevOps practices
Strong client‑service mindset and ability to work independently

What’s on offer?

Opportunity to work on large‑scale, enterprise systems within a complex and rewarding environment
Long‑term contract with extension potential
Competitive day rate
Collaborative, professional delivery team
Exposure to modern technologies and best‑practice engineering standards
